stemHtml: An aircraft encountering radio communication failure on an IFR flight in IMC has to land, if possible, within…

options.a: 30 minutes after noticing the radio failure.
options.b: 15 minutes after vacating the transition layer.
options.c: 30 minutes after ETA or the last EAT, whichever is later.
options.d: 30 minutes after waiting for the EAT.
